picks.rationale: RKLB has surged +88.81% YTD and +73.89% in the past month, with a buy analyst consensus score of 1.61 and positive news sentiment of 0.15, driven by strong space demand and recent contract momentum.
PL has skyrocketed +150.56% YTD and +38.33% in the past month, with a buy analyst consensus score of 2.0 and massive momentum from space and satellite imagery demand.
RCAT has gained +58.30% YTD and +60.58% in the past week, with a strong_buy analyst consensus score of 1.2, reflecting strong drone demand and Pentagon funding interest.
MRCY is up +46.92% YTD and +41.55% in the past month, with positive news sentiment of 0.128 and a record order for Common Processing Architecture servers, despite no analyst rating.
ASTS has rallied +35.87% YTD and +53.46% in the past month, with a hold analyst consensus score of 2.82 but strong space-based broadband momentum and positive news sentiment of 0.053.
HEI is up +5.77% YTD and +28.99% in the past month, with a buy analyst consensus score of 1.83 and positive news sentiment of 0.169, supported by strong aftermarket and defence spending.
RR.L has gained +11.73% YTD and +21.74% in the past month, with a buy analyst consensus score of 1.7 and a P/E of 19.38, benefiting from defence and aerospace engine demand.
DRS is up +40.76% YTD and +20.26% in the past month, with positive news sentiment of 0.18 and a new thermal drone camera launch, despite no analyst rating.
QQ.L has risen +13.31% YTD and +15.59% in the past month, with a buy analyst consensus score of 1.82 and positive news sentiment of 0.307, supported by UK defence spending.
PLTR is down -6.74% YTD but surged +12.53% in the past month and +13.92% in the past week, with a buy analyst consensus score of 1.9 and a catalyst from Dell blockbuster orders.
